# SOFTWARE SERVICES AGREEMENT

**Parties:** Acme Corp ("Client") and TechVendor Inc ("Vendor")
**Date:** January 1, 2025
**Contract Value:** $120,000 annually

## 1. Services

Vendor agrees to provide cloud-based data processing services to Client,
including data ingestion, transformation, storage, and analytics reporting.

## 2. Term and Termination

This agreement shall commence on the date first written above and continue
for an initial term of one year. Either party may terminate this agreement
with 30 days written notice to the other party.

## 3. Liability

Vendor's liability under this agreement shall be unlimited and cover all
direct, indirect, incidental, and consequential damages arising from any
service failures, data breaches, or failure to perform obligations.

## 4. Payment

Client shall pay all undisputed invoices within 60 days of receipt.
Late payments shall incur a 1.5% monthly interest charge.

## 5. Dispute Resolution

Any disputes arising under this agreement shall be resolved exclusively
through litigation in the state courts of Delaware. Both parties consent
to jurisdiction in Delaware.

## 6. Data Processing

Vendor will process and store all client data exclusively on US-based
servers. Vendor maintains industry-standard security practices for
data protection and access control.

## 7. Confidentiality

Both parties agree to maintain the confidentiality of proprietary
information shared during the course of this agreement for a period
of three years following termination.
